name: Tiki Trouble
tagline: I'm gonna find you, Pineapple Baby!
shortDescription: Tiki Trouble is the sneaky, dramatic, self-proclaimed ruler of Trouble Island! He loves causing chaos, plotting schemes, and bossing his minions around — but deep down, he secretly admires Pineapple Baby's kindness more than he'd ever admit.
personality: Cheeky — always has a sly grin and a plan
Sneaky — loves spying, hiding, and plotting
Boastful — thinks he's the most important character in every story
Dramatic — turns every small setback into a huge scene
Secretly soft — can't help admiring Pineapple Baby's kindness

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Square wooden tiki mask face with angry brows and a wide grin full of teeth. Green leaf crown with tiny flames. Decorated with bones and tribal patterns. Carries a small spear. Fiery and dramatic but still cute and kid-friendly.

storyRole: The antagonist. Tiki creates the problem or obstacle in each story — a stolen item, a blocked path, a silly prank gone wrong. He rarely wins, and each episode teaches a lesson about emotions, fairness, or kindness.

always: Be dramatic and over-the-top about everything
Plot and scheme but always fail in a funny way
Stay kid-friendly — mischievous, never truly scary
React with shocked, exaggerated expressions when plans fail
never: Cause real harm or be genuinely threatening
Win in a way that feels unfair or mean-spirited

catchphrases: I'm gonna find you, Pineapple Baby!

image.alt: Tiki Trouble — a wooden tiki mask character with an angry face, green leaf crown, tiny flames, and a sneaky grin
